info.name: Gym API
info.description:
Postman collection for gym-api (NestJS). Includes auth, branches, permissions, CRUD modules, attendance, inventory movements, membership plans, member subscriptions, products, product sales, reports, and selected negative tests.

Platform mapping:
- Web: Users
- Mobile: Trainers, Members

Recommended run order:
1) Authentication -> POST /auth/login (USER)
2) Users (Web) -> create (captures userId)
3) Trainers (Mobile) -> create (captures trainerId)
4) Members (Mobile) -> create (captures memberId)
5) Equipment / Attendance / Inventory Movements
6) Membership Plans -> create (captures membershipPlanId)
7) Member Subscriptions -> create (captures memberSubscriptionId), lifecycle, reports
8) Products -> create (captures productId)
9) Product Sales -> create (captures productSaleId), reports
10) Branches -> create/setup branch-admin context (captures branchId, secondBranchId, branchAdminUserId, branchAdminAccessToken)
11) Permissions -> me, roles, role details, upsert permissions (includes branch-admin branch-scoped checks)

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Authentication flows for Web and Mobile. Run POST /auth/login (USER - Web) first to populate {{accessToken}} for protected admin/user folders. Use POST /auth/login (MEMBER - Mobile) to populate {{memberAccessToken}} for member-specific/forbidden-path tests.

item.name: POST /auth/login (MEMBER - Mobile)
item.description: Logs in with a mobile member account and stores memberAccessToken for deterministic 403 tests.

item.name: Users (Web)
item.description: Web app user management APIs.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /users - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /users/:id - invalid id
item.description: Expect NotFound for a non-existing id.

item.name: Branches
item.description: Branch management and user assignment flow. Requires {{userId}} from Users create and captures {{branchId}} plus branch-admin setup variables.

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required before assigning branch admin'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminUserId')) { throw new Error('branchAdminUserId is required before assigning branch admin'); }

item.name: GET /branches/:id - own branch as branch admin

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }

item.name: PATCH /branches/:id - own branch as branch admin

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /branches - forbidden for branch admin

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /branches - forbidden for branch admin

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE DELETE /branches/:id - forbidden for branch admin

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchId')) { throw new Error('branchId is required'); }

item.name: POST /branches/:id/users - assign staff by branch admin

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminTargetUserId')) { throw new Error('branchAdminTargetUserId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /branches/:id/users - branch admin cannot assign ADMIN

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminTargetUserId')) { throw new Error('branchAdminTargetUserId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /branches/:id/users - branch admin cannot assign BRANCH_ADMIN

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminTargetUserId')) { throw new Error('branchAdminTargetUserId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /branches/:id/users - branch admin cannot manage another branch

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchId')) { throw new Error('branchId is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminTargetUserId')) { throw new Error('branchAdminTargetUserId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /branches/:id - invalid id
item.description: Expect NotFound for a non-existing branch id.

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /branches - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /branches - forbidden for member
item.description: Expect Forbidden for low-privilege member token on admin-only branch creation.

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /branches/:id/users - forbidden for member
item.description: Expect Forbidden for low-privilege member token on branch assignment management.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /branches - forbidden for member
item.description: Expect Forbidden for low-privilege member token on admin-only branch listing.

item.name: NEGATIVE DELETE /branches/:id - forbidden for member
item.description: Expect Forbidden for low-privilege member token on admin-only branch deletion.

item.name: Permissions
item.description: Role permission matrix APIs. Some routes require ROLE_PERMISSIONS permissions.

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }
pm.test('branch-admin context is not admin', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('isAdmin', false); });
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }
pm.test('response is an array', function () { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'); });
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('secondBranchId')) { throw new Error('secondBranchId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /permissions/me - branch admin another branch

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchId')) { throw new Error('branchId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE PUT /permissions/roles/:role - branch admin another branch

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchAdminAccessToken')) { throw new Error('branchAdminAccessToken is required'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('branchId')) { throw new Error('branchId is required'); }

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /permissions/roles/:role - invalid role
item.description: Expect validation error for unsupported role enum value.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /permissions/me - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /permissions/roles - forbidden for member
item.description: Expect Forbidden for low-privilege member token without ROLE_PERMISSIONS view access.

item.name: NEGATIVE PUT /permissions/roles/:role - forbidden for member
item.description: Expect Forbidden for low-privilege member token on permission updates.

item.name: Trainers (Mobile)
item.description: Mobile app trainer management APIs.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /trainers - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /trainers/:id - invalid id
item.description: Expect NotFound for a non-existing id.

item.name: Members (Mobile)
item.description: Mobile app member management APIs.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /members - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /members/:id - invalid id

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /equipment - missing bearer token

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /equipment/:id - invalid id

item.name: Membership Plans
item.description: Membership plan catalog flow. Run create first to store {{membershipPlanId}} for get/update/delete and subscription assignment.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /membership-plans - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /membership-plans/:id - invalid id
item.description: Expect NotFound for a non-existing id.

item.name: Member Subscriptions
item.description: Subscription lifecycle flow. Requires {{memberId}} and {{membershipPlanId}} from Members and Membership Plans folders. Run create first to set {{memberSubscriptionId}}, then pause/resume/cancel/report endpoints.

exec: pm.test('response is object or array', function () { pm.expect(['object', 'array']).to.include(typeof json); });
pm.test('response is object or array', function () { pm.expect(['object', 'array']).to.include(typeof json); });
pm.test('response is object or array', function () { pm.expect(['object', 'array']).to.include(typeof json); });

item.name: NEGATIVE POST /member-subscriptions/:id/expire - invalid id
item.description: Expect NotFound for a non-existing subscription id.

item.name: Products
item.description: Product catalog flow. Run create first to store {{productId}} for get/update/delete and product-sale assignments.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /products - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /products/:id - invalid id
item.description: Expect NotFound for a non-existing id.

item.name: Product Sales
item.description: Product sales lifecycle and reporting. Requires {{productId}} and optional {{memberId}}. Run create first to set {{productSaleId}}.

exec: pm.test('response is object or array', function () { pm.expect(['object', 'array']).to.include(typeof json); });
pm.test('response is object or array', function () { pm.expect(['object', 'array']).to.include(typeof json); });

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /product-sales - missing bearer token
item.description: Expect Unauthorized when access token is not provided.

item.name: NEGATIVE GET /product-sales/:id - invalid id
item.description: Expect NotFound for a non-existing id.
